sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110014" key="u(yotapei/nwma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑψοτᾰπείνωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n110014.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">variation of fortune, vicissitude,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:10:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.24</biblScope></bibl>, al., Critodem. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(1).259</biblScope> </bibl>: cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑψηλοταπείνωμα.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
